name: mofa-podcast
author: hagency
description: Multi-speaker podcast generation with TTS voice synthesis and audio assembly

tools.name: podcast_voices
tools.description: List all available voices for podcast speakers. Shows preset (built-in) voices and any saved custom/cloned voices. Call this when helping the user choose voices for their speakers.

tools.name: podcast_generate
tools.spawn_only_message: SUCCESS: Podcast generation is now running in background. Voice segments are being generated and will be assembled into the final audio file. The audio file will be automatically delivered when ready.
tools.description: Generate the full podcast audio from an approved markdown script. Parses all speaker lines, generates TTS for each segment (built-in voices first, then cloned to minimize model switching), concatenates in timeline order with pauses, and outputs a single final audio file. This runs in background — do NOT wait for it.

script.description: The full markdown podcast script content. Must contain [Character - voice, emotion] formatted lines.

script_path.description: Path to the markdown script file. Alternative to providing script content directly.

output_dir.description: Directory for output files. Defaults to skill-output/mofa-podcast/
